specs.case_material: Injected aluminum alloy top and injected ABS plastic bottom
specs.cooling_active: Blower type 30mm PWM actively controlled by the Raspberry Pi OS
specs.gpio_access: Full GPIO Access with Magnetic cover
specs.nvme_options: Single, Dual, or Quad M.2 NVMe PCIe drives
specs.ssd_options: 128 GB and 256 GB M.2 NVMe SSD
specs.fan_control: actively controlled by the Raspberry Pi OS
specs.recommended_ups: Argon PWR UPS for Argon ONE V5 27W PD
specs.usb_2_0_front: 2× USB 2.0 ports via FE1.1S USB Hub Chip
specs.audio: 3.5mm audio out + mic in, powered by HS100B DAC Chip
specs.nvme_thermal_pads: Blue silicon thermal pads applied to drives
specs.supplemental_power: Black NVMe power cable required for multi-drive boards
specs.oled_display_info: IP address, storage, CPU, and memory status
specs.zigbee_module: Argon Industria V5 with CC2562P chip
specs.zigbee_compatibility: Fully compatible with Home Assistant OS
specs.zigbee_port_conflict: Disables leftmost front USB port if installed
specs.not_included: Raspberry Pi 5, SD card, M.2 NVMe SSD drives
specs.active_cooling: 30mm blower-type PWM fan, software-controlled via Raspberry Pi OS
specs.passive_cooling: Aluminum alloy case body; aluminum THRML heatsinks on NVMe bottom
specs.gpio: Full 40-pin passthrough header with magnetic cover
specs.nvme_board_variants: Single (Gen 2), Dual Gen 2, Quad Gen 2, Dual Gen 3, Quad Gen 3

snapshot.description: Aluminum Raspberry Pi 5 case with M.2 NVMe SSD slot via PCIe for maximum storage performance.
